# Support

## Getting help

For usage questions or workflow confusion:

1. Read [README.md](../README.md)
2. Review [docs/13-contributor-roadmap.md](../docs/13-contributor-roadmap.md) if you want the current public contribution map
3. Start with [docs/README.md](../docs/README.md)
4. Review [repos/workspace-hub/README.md](../repos/workspace-hub/README.md) for Hub-specific behavior
5. Ask in [GitHub Discussions Q&A](https://github.com/RichardGeorgeDavis/Codex-Workspace/discussions/categories/q-a) if you still need help

## Where to open issues

- Use [GitHub Discussions Q&A](https://github.com/RichardGeorgeDavis/Codex-Workspace/discussions/categories/q-a) for usage questions, setup help, or workflow discussion
- Browse [`help wanted`](https://github.com/RichardGeorgeDavis/Codex-Workspace/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen%20label%3A%22help%20wanted%22) if you want current contribution-ready tasks
- Open a bug report for reproducible problems
- Open a docs issue for unclear or missing documentation
- Open a feature request for focused improvements

## Before opening an issue

- if the request is primarily a question, use Discussions instead
- confirm the question is about this repository rather than a separate repo stored under `repos/`
- include the affected file paths or workspace area
- include runtime steps if the problem involves Workspace Hub
- include a concrete acceptance signal when you can
